Katagoge is the opposite of [[anagoge]]. It is another word for [[shuttering]] referring more to the negative effects of it in closing your perspective than in the suffering element.

{{Wiktionary|katagoge}} 

== References ==
[[Category:Nobility]]
[[Category:Ascension]]
[[sn:Katagoge]][[Category:Shuttering]]
[[Category:Ennoblement]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Katagoge]]
[[Category:Pages]]
